case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. ROBERT W LANCASTER

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100037258) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT LANCASTER, ROBERT W

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANCASTER, ROBERT W $5,301.14 PRINCIPAL, $875.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,401.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100037258) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LANCASTER, ROBERT W
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-16-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100045994) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LANCASTER, ROBERT W
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-16-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LANCASTER, ROBERT W SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-20-2018
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.
